titles.title: What a Faithful God Have I

properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2 V5 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Lord, i come before Your throne of grace I find rest in Your presence, And fullness of Joy In worship and wonder I behold Your face Singing what a faithful God have I

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: What a faithful God have I What a faithful God What a faithful God have I You are faithful in every way

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Lord I come before your throne of grace I find rest in Your presence And fullness of joy In worship and wonder I behold Your face Singing what a faithful God have I

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Lord of mercy, You have heard my cry Through the storm Youre the beacon My song in the night In the shelter of Your wings Hear my hearts reply Singing what a faithful God have I

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Lord all sovereign Granting peace from heaven Let me comfort those who suffer With the comfort You have given I will tell of Your great love For as long as I live Singing what a faithful God have I
